description: Voice-to-LLM Streaming - Send transcribed text to LLM and stream responses in real-time on voice panel

userStories.title: Add LLM backend integration to voice pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate the existing LLM backend (Mistral) into the voice pipeline so that transcribed text can be processed.
acceptanceCriteria: Import MistralBackend, ProviderConfig, ModelConfig from voicevibe.llm modules
Add function _call_llm_streaming() that takes session, transcript text, and returns streaming response
Use MistralBackend.complete_streaming() with mistral-small-latest model
Use existing MISTRAL_API_KEY environment variable for authentication
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Stream LLM chunks to frontend via WebSocket
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the AI response appear in real-time as it's generated.
acceptanceCriteria: Send vv_llm_start message when LLM streaming begins
Send vv_llm_chunk message for each streaming chunk with text field
Send vv_llm_done message when streaming completes
Handle errors gracefully with vv_llm_error message
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Integrate LLM call after transcription completion
userStories.description: As a user, I want my transcribed question to be answered by an AI assistant automatically after I finish speaking.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify _run_voice_pipeline to call LLM after transcription done (in _SilenceAfterSpeech exception handler)
Pass the transcribed text from _consume_asr to LLM
Send vv_status='llm_streaming' when LLM starts
Send vv_status='llm_done' when LLM completes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add Q&A display UI to voice panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my question and the AI's response in a clear Q&A format.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Q&A container HTML below transcript-box in voice panel (voice.js)
Add question div with label '问题:' and id='llm-question'
Add answer div with label '回答:' and id='llm-answer'
Q&A container hidden initially (display: none)
Add CSS styles for Q&A sections in styles.css
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Handle LLM streaming messages in frontend
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the AI response appear word-by-word in real-time with smooth updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Shiny message handler for vv_llm_start: show Q&A container, set question text
Add Shiny message handler for vv_llm_chunk: append text to answer element
Add Shiny message handler for vv_llm_done: keep Q&A visible, no further changes
Add Shiny message handler for vv_llm_error: show error message in answer area
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Reset Q&A state on new voice session
userStories.description: As a user, when I start a new voice session, the previous Q&A content should be cleared.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear Q&A content in openVoicePanel() function
Set question and answer text to empty strings
Hide Q&A container (display: none)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
